use_cases: Decorative section headers for landing pages and hero sections
Adding organic, hand-drawn visual flair to typography presentations
Creating animated underlines or border effects around text elements
Enhancing creative portfolios or design-focused websites with artistic touches
Adding visual interest to blog posts or article titles
ai_summary: An animated SVG component that draws a hand-drawn, organic-looking decorative path around text using Framer Motion's pathLength animation. Creates a subtle, elegant underline effect with a 2.5-second draw animation on mount. Ideal for adding artistic, handcrafted visual interest to headings and titles in landing pages, hero sections, or creative portfolios.
